sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44633" key="eu)orkhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐορκ-ησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fidelity to one's oath</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0401.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alexand.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
